name: Doge's Palace
unlockCondition: Government structure only, not privately constructable
calculationsAnalysis: The Doge's Palace represents the ultimate governmental structure with extraordinary investment requirements. The construction cost of 50,000,000 ducats reflects the unparalleled architectural significance and materials, while the income of 75,000 ducats (0.15% return) represents administrative fees, tourism, and ceremonial functions. The maintenance cost of 250,000 ducats still exceeds this income, creating a realistic scenario where this centerpiece of government requires substantial ongoing investment. The employment capacity of 200 represents the extensive administrative staff, guards, and service personnel. The construction time of 90 days (7776000000ms) reflects the monumental construction project. This unique building serves as the centerpiece of Venetian governance with appropriate restrictions preventing private construction, reflecting the historical reality of this singular structure that embodied the Republic's political system.
shortDescription: Seat of government for the Venetian Republic, housing the Doge and major councils.
fullDescription: The political heart of Venice, the Doge's Palace (Palazzo Ducale) houses the Republic's key governmental institutions. Featuring the Great Council chamber, Senate hall, Doge's apartments, judicial facilities, and administrative offices, this architectural masterpiece combines practical governance with symbolic authority. Its distinctive design represents Venice's unique political identity, balancing power between the Doge, aristocracy, and complex council system.
flavorText: These walls have witnessed a thousand years of decisions that shaped Venice and beyond—for while emperors may command with swords, the true art of governance is found in these chambers where words, votes, and laws determine the fate of nations.

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: San Marco district only, waterfront facing Basin
locationRequirements.adjacentRequirements: St. Mark's Basilica adjacency, grand piazza frontage
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Center of political power, creates governmental district

name: St. Mark's Basilica
unlockCondition: Religious structure only, not privately constructable
calculationsAnalysis: St. Mark's Basilica represents the ultimate religious structure with extraordinary artistic and spiritual significance. The construction cost of 60,000,000 ducats reflects the unparalleled architectural complexity and precious materials, while the income of 75,000 ducats (0.125% return) represents donations, religious tourism, and ceremonial fees. The maintenance cost of 200,000 ducats still far exceeds income, creating a realistic scenario where the state's primary religious building required substantial ongoing support. The employment capacity of 60 represents the clergy, guards, and maintenance staff. The construction time of 120 days (10368000000ms) reflects the monumental construction and artistic project. This unique building serves as the spiritual center of Venice with appropriate restrictions preventing private construction, reflecting the historical reality of this singular structure that embodied the Republic's religious identity.
shortDescription: Primary cathedral of Venice combining religious significance with state symbolism.
fullDescription: The spiritual center of Venice, St. Mark's Basilica (Basilica di San Marco) serves as both religious cathedral and state church. Featuring Byzantine-influenced architecture, spectacular golden mosaics, the famous quadriga horses, and St. Mark's relics, this magnificent structure blends Eastern and Western traditions. As the Doge's personal chapel and venue for state ceremonies, it represents the fusion of religious and political authority in Venetian governance.
flavorText: Gold above, marble below, and centuries of prayer in between—this basilica stands not merely as a church, but as Venice's spiritual foundation and the treasure house of her most sacred relics and memories.

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: San Marco district only, adjacent to Doge's Palace
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Religious center, creates spiritual focal point, pilgrimage destination

name: Rialto Bridge
unlockCondition: Government project only, not privately constructable
calculationsAnalysis: The Rialto Bridge represents a unique infrastructure project with both practical and symbolic value. The construction cost of 35,000,000 ducats reflects the engineering challenges and architectural significance, while the income of 150,000 ducats (0.43% return) represents the rental fees from shops built on the bridge. The maintenance cost of 150,000 ducats creates a break-even financial profile appropriate for essential infrastructure with commercial elements. The employment capacity of 30 represents the shop operators and maintenance staff. The construction time of 60 days (5184000000ms) reflects the complex engineering project. This unique building serves as a critical connection between Venice's commercial and governmental districts with appropriate restrictions preventing private construction, reflecting the historical reality of this singular structure that combined infrastructure with commercial space.
shortDescription: Main bridge spanning the Grand Canal with shops, connecting San Marco and Rialto districts.
fullDescription: The commercial artery connecting Venice's governmental and financial centers, the Rialto Bridge spans the Grand Canal at its narrowest point. Featuring a single bold stone arch, rows of shops on either side of the central pathway, and distinctive architectural details, this engineering marvel combines practical transportation with commercial opportunity. As a symbol of Venice's commercial prowess and engineering skill, it remains one of the city's most recognizable landmarks.
flavorText: Some bridges merely connect two shores, but the Rialto connects commerce with governance, tradition with innovation, and engineering with art—all in a single, perfect arch that seems to defy gravity while defining Venice.

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: Grand Canal at narrowest point between San Marco and Rialto
locationRequirements.adjacentRequirements: Commercial districts on both sides, water traffic clearance
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Creates major commercial thoroughfare, increases property values

name: Clocktower
unlockCondition: Government project only, not privately constructable
calculationsAnalysis: The Clocktower represents specialized public infrastructure with technological significance. The construction cost of 20,000,000 ducats reflects the complex mechanical systems and architectural integration, while generating no direct income reflects its public service rather than commercial purpose. The maintenance cost of 75,000 ducats creates a substantial ongoing expense justified by its practical and symbolic importance. The employment capacity of 5 represents the specialized technicians needed to maintain the complex mechanism. The construction time of 40 days (3456000000ms) reflects the precision engineering project. This unique building serves as both practical timekeeper and symbol of Venetian technological prowess with appropriate restrictions preventing private construction, reflecting the historical reality of this singular structure that represented the Republic's orderly governance.
shortDescription: Public timepiece marking hours with automatons and astronomical indicators.
fullDescription: Regulating Venetian life through public timekeeping, the Clock Tower (Torre dell'Orologio) combines practical function with astronomical artistry. Featuring an ornate blue and gold clockface, zodiac indicators, automated figures striking the hours, and a bell at the top, this sophisticated mechanism represented cutting-edge Renaissance technology. Its prominent position overlooking St. Mark's Square symbolized Venice's orderly governance and scientific advancement.
flavorText: How better to demonstrate the Republic's mastery over commerce than to measure and display time itself—for in Venice, even the hours are counted, regulated, and transformed into the rhythm of prosperity.

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: San Marco district, entrance to Mercerie from piazza
locationRequirements.adjacentRequirements: Visibility from main square, prominent position
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Creates public time reference, architectural focal point

name: Glass Guild Hall
unlockCondition: Glass Guild Master status or 25,000 ducats with Guild connections, Murano location
calculationsAnalysis: The Glass Guild Hall represents specialized institutional infrastructure with industry governance functions. The construction cost of 12,500,000 ducats reflects the prestigious architecture and specialized facilities required, while the income of 75,000 ducats (0.6% return) represents membership fees and regulatory charges. The maintenance cost of 60,000 ducats (80% of income) creates a modest surplus appropriate for a non-profit institution. The employment capacity of 20 represents the administrative staff and industry experts. The construction time of 20 days (1728000000ms) reflects the specialized construction requirements. This building creates a strategic investment in industry governance with appropriate guild requirements reflecting the historical importance of guild regulation in Venice's glass industry, which maintained quality standards and protected valuable trade secrets.
shortDescription: Headquarters of the Murano Glass Guild governing the prestigious Venetian glass industry.
fullDescription: Regulating Venice's world-renowned glass industry, the Glass Guild Hall serves as administrative center and knowledge repository for this crucial craft. Featuring meeting chambers, demonstration facilities, archives of designs and techniques, and ceremonial spaces, this distinguished institution maintains quality standards while protecting trade secrets. Located on Murano island, it governs every aspect of Venetian glassmaking from apprenticeships to export regulations.
flavorText: Within these walls we preserve not merely the techniques of our craft, but its very soul—for while any furnace can melt sand, only the true traditions of Murano transform it into miracles of transparency and color.

locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Increases glass industry prestige, creates regulatory center

name: Merchant Guild Hall
unlockCondition: Merchant Guild Master status or 25,000 ducats with Guild connections
calculationsAnalysis: The Merchant Guild Hall's economic profile reflects its prestigious institutional role. The substantial construction cost (15,000,000 ducats) represents the impressive architecture and central location required for Venice's commercial governance. The high income of 100,000 ducats (0.67% return) represents membership fees, service charges, and regulatory income, while the maintenance cost of 75,000 ducats (75% of income) reflects the administrative staff and building upkeep. This creates a modest profit margin appropriate for a semi-governmental institution, while providing substantial indirect benefits through trade regulation and commercial reputation. This building represents a significant investment that pays dividends through both direct income and system-wide commercial advantages.
shortDescription: Headquarters of the Merchant Guild governing trade practices, standards, and commercial relationships.
fullDescription: Coordinating Venice's vast commercial networks, the Merchant Guild Hall serves as the central institution for trading activities and relationships. Featuring grand meeting halls, contract rooms, price-setting chambers, foreign trade offices, and extensive archives, this imposing institution regulates every aspect of Venetian commerce. Its strategic location near the Rialto emphasizes its central role in the Republic's commercial success and international trading power.
flavorText: Ships and goods are merely the visible manifestations of trade—the true art of commerce lives here, where relationships are cultivated, standards maintained, and the invisible networks of trust and credit span continents and cultures.

locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Creates commercial regulatory center, increases business activity

name: Silk Guild Hall
unlockCondition: Textile Guild Master status or 22,000 ducats with Guild connections
calculationsAnalysis: The Silk Guild Hall represents specialized institutional infrastructure for Venice's prestigious textile industry. The construction cost of 12,000,000 ducats reflects the elegant architecture and specialized facilities required, while the income of 85,000 ducats (0.71% return) represents membership fees, quality certification charges, and pattern registration fees. The maintenance cost of 65,000 ducats (76.5% of income) creates a modest surplus appropriate for a non-profit institution. The employment capacity of 30 represents the administrative staff, quality inspectors, and design archivists. The construction time of 20 days (1728000000ms) reflects the specialized construction requirements. This building creates a strategic investment in textile industry governance with appropriate guild requirements reflecting the historical importance of quality control and design protection in Venice's luxury textile trade.
shortDescription: Headquarters of the Silk Guild governing the prestigious textile industry and fashion standards.
fullDescription: Regulating Venice's lucrative textile trade, the Silk Guild Hall administers this sophisticated industry from raw material import to finished luxury products. Featuring material testing facilities, pattern archives, quality control chambers, fashion design spaces, and international trade offices, this influential institution maintained Venice's reputation for textile excellence. Its regulation of everything from dye standards to weaving techniques ensured consistent quality in one of Venice's most profitable industries.
flavorText: The silk thread is delicate yet strong, simple yet refined—much like the regulations that govern our craft, which must be strict enough to ensure quality yet flexible enough to permit the innovation that keeps Venice at fashion's forefront.

locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Creates fashion industry center, increases textile activity

name: Shipwright Guild Hall
unlockCondition: Maritime Guild Master status or 24,000 ducats with Guild connections
calculationsAnalysis: The Shipwright Guild Hall represents specialized institutional infrastructure for Venice's crucial shipbuilding industry. The construction cost of 13,000,000 ducats reflects the robust architecture and specialized technical facilities required, while the income of 90,000 ducats (0.69% return) represents membership fees, design certification charges, and quality inspection fees. The maintenance cost of 70,000 ducats (77.8% of income) creates a modest surplus appropriate for a non-profit institution. The employment capacity of 25 represents the administrative staff, naval engineers, and quality inspectors. The construction time of 20 days (1728000000ms) reflects the specialized construction requirements. This building creates a strategic investment in maritime industry governance with appropriate guild requirements reflecting the historical importance of standardization and quality control in Venice's shipbuilding industry, which was essential to both commercial and military power.
shortDescription: Headquarters of the Shipwright Guild governing naval construction and maritime engineering standards.
fullDescription: Overseeing Venice's crucial shipbuilding industry, the Shipwright Guild Hall regulates the construction techniques and standards that maintained the Republic's naval superiority. Featuring design archives, model testing facilities, timber quality control, technical libraries, and training spaces, this specialized institution ensured consistent excellence in both merchant and naval vessels. Its regulations governed everything from material selection to construction techniques across Venice's numerous shipyards.
flavorText: The ship is the most complex machine of our age, and the most vital to our prosperity—thus each nail, plank, and rope must meet standards forged from centuries of experience, triumph, and occasional tragedy at sea.

locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Creates maritime engineering center, shipbuilding focus

name: Goldsmith Guild Hall
unlockCondition: Goldsmith Guild Master status or 20,000 ducats with Guild connections
calculationsAnalysis: The Goldsmith Guild Hall represents specialized institutional infrastructure for Venice's prestigious precious metals industry. The construction cost of 11,000,000 ducats reflects the secure architecture and specialized facilities required, while the income of 80,000 ducats (0.73% return) represents membership fees, hallmarking charges, and quality certification fees. The maintenance cost of 60,000 ducats (75% of income) creates a modest surplus appropriate for a non-profit institution. The employment capacity of 20 represents the administrative staff, assayers, and security personnel. The construction time of 15 days (1296000000ms) reflects the specialized construction requirements. This building creates a strategic investment in luxury goods governance with appropriate guild requirements reflecting the historical importance of quality assurance and fraud prevention in Venice's goldsmithing industry, which maintained the city's reputation for fine jewelry and precious metal work.
shortDescription: Headquarters of the Goldsmith Guild governing precious metal crafting and jewelry standards.
fullDescription: Regulating Venice's prestigious precious metals industry, the Goldsmith Guild Hall ensures the quality and authenticity of gold and silver work throughout the city. Featuring metal testing laboratories, design archives, gem assessment facilities, security vaults, and demonstration spaces, this exclusive institution maintains strict standards on materials and craftsmanship. Its certification was required for all precious metal works, ensuring consistent quality in this high-value industry.
flavorText: Gold may seem unchangeable, but the craftsman's hand transforms it from mere wealth to immortal beauty—our guild ensures that when the Venetian mark is struck on gold, both the metal and the craftsmanship are beyond reproach.

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: Secure area, often near government district
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Creates luxury craft center, increases precious metal activity
